template.name: disbursement_ach_batch_header
template.description: Record the preparation of a NACHA ACH file on the Economic ledger by debiting a per-file Master FBO - ACH Clearing Files (10104) instance and crediting the permanent Master FBO - Clearing Total (10101), establishing the clearing balance that per-customer ACH submission events (T5204) will draw down to zero.

financial_statements_impact.description: Asset-to-asset reclassification within Master FBO clearing: per-file ACH Clearing Files (10104) debit balance increases and Clearing Total (10101) credit balance increases equally. Total economic ledger assets unchanged.

template.trigger: A NACHA ACH file is prepared and ready for submission. Fires once per ACH batch file before any per-customer submission events (T5204) for that file.

ledger_scope_descriptions.operational: Operational ledger (ID 5001) where the batch header establishes the per-file clearing balance under Master FBO - ACH Clearing Files (10104).

accounting_treatments.description: Establish the per-file clearing balance by transferring the file total from a per-file ACH Clearing Files (10104) instance to the permanent Clearing Total; no P&L impact.

account_code_validations.description: Per-file clearing instance (Master FBO - ACH Clearing Files) on the economic ledger; debited with the file total, then drawn down to zero by per-customer ACH submission events (T5204 leg 1).
Permanent accumulator account (Master FBO - Clearing Total) on the economic ledger; credited once per ACH batch file for the file total.

ach_file_id.description: NACHA ACH file reference used to create/select the per-file ACH Clearing Files (10104) instance and for batch traceability.

expected_entry_count.description: Number of customer entries expected in this ACH batch file, for monitoring and reconciliation.

legs.description: Seed the per-file ACH Clearing Files (10104) instance with the ACH batch total; per-customer submissions draw this down to zero.

examples.name: ach_batch_header_500
examples.description: Batch header for a $500.00 ACH disbursement file (ach-disb-2026-03-01-001) with 2 expected customer entries ($200 Customer A + $300 Customer B).
